title: Shootout at Lokhandwala
subTitle: A notorious gangster rules over the Mumbai's underworld with an iron fist. However, his growing influence prompts a group of police officers to plot a strategy to clear the city of organised crime.

title: Mahadev Ka Gorakhpur
subTitle: When evil descends chaotically upon the goodness of the land, a righteous warrior of Lord Shiva arrives to deliver justice to the wicked.

title: Wagah
subTitle: An Indian soldier falls in love with a Muslim girl near the India-Pakistan border. However, when a riot breaks out in the area, the man finds his love and his life at risk.

title: One Way Ticket
subTitle: Kunjappu, a jeep driver and an ardent admirer of superstar Mammootty, finds himself troubled when his relationship is in disarray. But he is rapt when Mammootty himself intervenes to solve his issues.

title: I Proud to Be an Indian
subTitle: I, a man from India, travels to London for a family wedding and finds that their community is being threatened by a racist group. Seeing this, he decides to get involved and fight back.

title: Thadam
subTitle: While investigating the death of a man, the police track down their lead suspect. However, the case takes a twisted turn when they discover a clone of their suspect.

title: Theeran Adhigaaram Ondru
subTitle: Theeran, a dedicated police officer, pays the price for his honesty and faces hardships when he tries to investigate the illegal activities conducted by a powerful gangster.

title: Rider
subTitle: As love blossoms between orphans Chinnu and Kitty, fate separates them as children. However, they grow up yearning to find each other.

title: Maragadha Naanayam
subTitle: Senguttuvan and Elango work for a smuggler who hires them to retrieve an emerald medallion, a cursed treasure linked to many deaths. Seeking help, they consult a priest and summon three spirits to locate it.

title: Tanhaji: The Unsung Warrior
subTitle: Tanhaji, a Maratha warrior, is Shivaji Maharaj's trusted lieutenant. When the Mughals invade and conquer Kondhana fort, he sets out to reclaim it for his king and country.

title: ACP Shiva
subTitle: Shivakumar IPS, a corrupt police officer, joins GK, a local politician, in his immoral activities. However, when GK's brother kills his best friend, he decides to turn over a new leaf.

title: Chithha
subTitle: Living a quiet life with his niece, Eeswaran manages to provide for her and nurtures her like a parent. However, his journey takes an insidous turn when she goes missing.

title: Chithha
subTitle: Living a quiet life with his niece, Eeswaran manages to provide for her and nurtures her like a parent. However, his journey takes an insidous turn when she goes missing.

title: Coolie Raja
subTitle: When a woman from a wealthy family falls in love with a porter, the couple tries to prove that their love is stronger than the differences in their social status.

title: Waqt Ki Awaz
subTitle: Aditya, an assistant director, tries to impress Suma by narrating his old love story. However, while narrating the story, he realises his true feelings for his ex-lover.

title: Global Baba
subTitle: Pehlwaan, a criminal, narrowly escapes a police encounter and uses a holy man's guise to hide. Though he soon amasses a large number of followers, he continues to carry out his illegal activities.

title: Blue
subTitle: Sagar, Sam and Aarav decide to dive underwater to find treasure in a sunken ship in order to help Sam clear his debt. However, one of them has a hidden agenda of his own.

title: The Great Veera
subTitle: A police officer fears for the safety of his family after he incurs the wrath of a local gangster. Fortunately, a security officer is tasked with protecting him and his loved ones.

title: Kabali
subTitle: A man spends 25 years in prison for fighting against oppression. Old but still bloodthirsty, he decides to seek revenge against his enemies upon his release.

title: Yajamana
subTitle: Devi Shetty, a cruel gangster, is out to plunder a village's oil resources and ruin its inhabitants' livelihood. However, the son-in-law of the village head, Krishna, stands in his way.

title: Balloon
subTitle: Jeevanand rents an old house in Ooty with his wife and nephew hoping to find inspiration to write a script. However, strange events begin unfolding in the house which are linked to his past.

title: Jack
subTitle: Prasad is struggling to understand his good-for-nothing son, Pablo Neruda. Determined to find out about his son's activities, he hires a private investigator, Afshana.

title: Veera Simha Reddy
subTitle: Jai Simha Reddy, the son of the esteemed Veera Simha Reddy, returns home to avenge his father's death as a result of village politics.

title: Gangs of Wasseypur
subTitle: Sardar sets out to avenge his father who was murdered by Ramadhir Singh, a cunning politician and mining kingpin. In the ensuing war, many unresolved family feuds erupt creating unrest.

title: Gangs of Wasseypur
subTitle: Sardar sets out to avenge his father who was murdered by Ramadhir Singh, a cunning politician and mining kingpin. In the ensuing war, many unresolved family feuds erupt creating unrest.

title: Ek Aur Mrityu Pujan
subTitle: When the shadow of evil starts taking over the world, a warrior fights for good, as an avatar of Narasimha, a lion god, who is known for destroying evil.

title: 99 Songs
subTitle: A musician must compose 100 songs in order to reunite with his lover. However, his journey of heartbreak, redemption, loss and faith allows him to discover much more than love.

title: Lekar Hum Deewana Dil
subTitle: Dino and Karishma get married in Goa and head to the lesser-known parts of the country, afraid of being caught by their parents. However, they start facing multiple challenges in their marital life.

title: Raa Raa
subTitle: Raj Kiran, a filmmaker who is down on his luck, tries to revive his career by shooting a horror movie in a dingy bungalow. However, he and his crew are unaware that the bungalow is actually haunted.

title: Mahadev Ka Gorakhpur
subTitle: When evil descends chaotically upon the goodness of the land, a righteous warrior of Lord Shiva arrives to deliver justice to the wicked.

title: Ram Ki Jung
subTitle: Ram does not believe in everlasting love and this ideology does not go down well with Jaanu. When Abhishek, a police officer, asks him the reason, he tells him about Rooba, his former lover.

title: Power Unlimited
subTitle: Tirupathi, who wants to become a police officer, must pose as ACP Baldev, his lookalike, to rescue Ganguly, the brother of the Home Minister Jayavardhan.

title: Yudh Ek Jung
subTitle: Chandu, a supermarket employee, encounters trouble when he decides to help Indu, an aspiring actress, and gets embroiled in a murder case.

title: Main hoon Surya Singham 2
subTitle: An undercover police officer works in a school and tries to put an end to the criminal activities of two criminals who rule the area.

title: Golmaal Again
subTitle: Five orphan men return to the orphanage they grew up in to attend their mentor's funeral. However, they encounter the ghost of their childhood friend, Khushi, and help her attain salvation.

title: Bogan
subTitle: A police officer probes a seasoned robber, oblivious to his hidden power, which allows him to possess people through eye contact.
